text.title: Modern BA Framework Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Use BABOK as the primary framework; document conformance.
Use Lean BA; optimise for discovery cadence.

example.trace: rigour=9, speed=6, regulation=9 → Hybrid with BABOK governing compliance artefacts.
